title: Build a Hermes Knowledge Base That Self-Improves
summary: This tutorial demonstrates how to build a self-improving knowledge base for the Hermes AI agent using Obsidian as a wiki vault, integrating it with Claude and NotebookLM. The workflow automatically ingests meeting notes, emails, and research through cron jobs powered by Granola, implementing Karpathy's LLM wiki principles to overcome LLM context limitations.
writeup: This tutorial builds a self-improving knowledge base for the Hermes AI agent, using Obsidian as a wiki vault and integrating Claude and NotebookLM. The workflow automatically ingests meeting notes, emails, and research through cron jobs powered by Granola, applying Karpathy's LLM wiki principles to address context limitations. The takeaway: a structured wiki that updates itself can serve as durable retrieval memory for an agent rather than relying on a single context window.
